_meta.purpose: Tracks all 75 implementation milestones for the Metis Research Cortex redesign. Statuses: pending | in_progress | completed | skipped. Each completed item records a date and optional notes.

items.notes: No changes needed.

items.subject: Strip Today tab to locked layout: greeting strip, overnight summary, launcher row, focus, scan, token footer
items.notes: mod_today.R fully rewritten. Removed KPI boxes, git panel, snapshot, publications panel, project boards, recent files, task table. New structure: 6 sections.

items.subject: Build six launcher cards with Today-level simplified actions
items.notes: launcher-row grid with 6 buttons: Capture idea, Brainstorm, Work on document, Review code, Prep meeting, Process inbox. Each opens a modal with copy-prompt block or navigation action.

items.subject: Build 'What's new overnight' summary
items.notes: overnight-card shows counts for news items, new papers, new ideas, meetings from last 24h. Shows 'clean slate' message when nothing is new.

items.subject: Build 'Today's focus' card
items.notes: focus_ui shows highest-priority active project with domain badge, priority chip, and next step. Conditional — returns NULL when no active projects.

items.subject: Build 'Scan for changes' button and result area
items.notes: Scan button checks: git dirty/unpushed across active projects, tracked_files with watch=1 changed today, PLANNING.md files updated today. Results shown in scan-section groups.

items.subject: Wire trust badge into navbar header
items.notes: nav_spacer() + nav_item(div.trust-badge) added to page_navbar. Shows green shield + 'Local-first' text. Static for now — session call tracking is Phase 4.

items.subject: Build Ctrl+K / Cmd+K shortcut handler + '+ Capture' navbar button
items.notes: JS keydown listener in app.R header fires global_capture input. nav_item button does the same. Both trigger quick_capture_server module via reactive(input$global_capture).

items.subject: Build capture modal with auto-classification (prefix routing)
items.notes: mod_capture.R: quick_capture_server module. Modal shows prefix hints (i: n: t: q:). parse_capture_prefix() classifies text live. renderUI type badge updates as user types. Prefix is stripped before saving.

items.subject: Wire modal to SQLite via capture_idea schema (same DB as MCP tool)
items.notes: i:/default → insert_idea(). n: → insert_quick_note() (personal_notes). t: → insert_task(). q: → insert_idea(idea_type='question'). auto_tags() mirrors MCP tool tag extraction. Also fixed schema bug in mod_today.R quick-capture (was using wrong column names).

items.subject: Design session_events and session_context schemas
Implement session bootstrap stage
Implement Data Guardian intercept stage
Implement Cybersecurity intercept stage
Implement intent parsing stage

Implement logging stage

Wire all stages together and run end-to-end pipeline tests
Install sqlite-vec and set up vector tables
items.notes: sqlite-vec 0.1.9 installed in venv. vec_episodic, vec_semantic, vec_procedural virtual tables defined in vector_memory.py DDL.

items.subject: Install sentence-transformers and pick embedding model
items.notes: Using fastembed 0.8.0 (ONNX, no PyTorch needed) instead of sentence-transformers. Model: BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5, 384 dims. embeddings.py provides lazy-loaded embed()/embed_one(). Model downloads to ~/.cache/fastembed on first use.

items.subject: Implement episodic memory layer
items.notes: store_episodic_memory() MCP tool. Table: episodic_memory + vec_episodic virtual table. Stores events with type (idea/note/task/paper/meeting/agent_run), content, metadata, session_id.

items.subject: Implement semantic memory graph
items.notes: store_semantic_memory() MCP tool. Table: semantic_memory + vec_semantic. Stores concept/definition nodes with related_concepts and source linkage.

items.subject: Implement procedural memory tracker
items.notes: store_procedural_memory() MCP tool. Table: procedural_memory + vec_procedural. Stores workflow patterns with trigger_context and step-by-step instructions.

items.subject: Implement working memory
items.notes: set_working_memory() + get_working_memory() MCP tools. Table: working_memory. Per-session key/value scratchpad for mid-pipeline state.

items.subject: Implement reflexive memory
items.notes: Handled by write_reflexion() in self_improvement.py (Phase 4). reflexion_log table captures agent self-critiques. No separate implementation needed.

items.subject: Build retrieval pipeline with RRF fusion and reranking
items.notes: semantic_search() MCP tool. Vector similarity (sqlite-vec KNN) + keyword LIKE fused via RRF (k=60). Searches episodic, semantic, and procedural layers. Returns top_k ranked results.

items.subject: Build retrieval debugger UI in Metis → Memory
items.notes: Needs R Shiny tab in mod_metis.R to call semantic_search() and display layered results. Defer to after MCP tools are confirmed working.

items.subject: Build anonymization function (Python + NER)
Build diff view for anonymized content
Build trust badge in dashboard header
Build consent ledger table and UI
Build network policy switcher (strict/normal/airplane)
backup_db MCP tool — SQLite Online Backup API
items.notes: tools/backup.py: backup_db(destination, label, extra_destination). Uses sqlite3.Connection.backup() — safe for live WAL databases. Produces timestamped .sqlite files. Returns path, size, SHA-256 checksum, elapsed_ms.

items.subject: encrypt_backup MCP tool — AES-256-GCM
items.notes: encrypt_backup(backup_path, passphrase). Uses cryptography 46.0.6 (PBKDF2-SHA256, 200k rounds, AES-256-GCM). Falls back to XOR-SHA256 with warning if library absent. Format: METISBK1 magic + 16B salt + 12B nonce + ciphertext+tag.

items.subject: list_backups + multi-destination write
items.notes: list_backups(backup_dir): scans .sqlite/.enc files, returns name/path/size/age/type. backup_db() supports extra_destination for off-site copy.

items.subject: restore_db MCP tool — safe restore with pre-restore copy
items.notes: restore_db(backup_path, confirm='YES'). Renames live DB to .pre-restore.<ts>.sqlite before overwriting. Returns status, paths, and restart reminder.

items.subject: verify_backup MCP tool — PRAGMA integrity_check
items.notes: verify_backup(backup_path): opens backup in read-only mode, runs PRAGMA integrity_check, returns status/tables/messages. Also: set_backup_schedule + get_backup_schedule persist nightly schedule to system/config/backup-schedule.json for Phase 10 scheduler.

items.subject: Test full wipe-and-restore cycle
items.notes: Manual verification — run backup_db, verify_backup, restore_db in sequence against a copy of the live DB.

items.subject: brainstorm_turn MCP tool + session table
items.notes: tools/brainstorm.py: brainstorm_turn(topic, steering, session_uuid, turn_notes). Fetches context: ideas, personal_notes, open questions, library .md notes. 5 steering modes (expand/focus/challenge/synthesize/connect) each with 3 steering prompts. brainstorm_sessions + brainstorm_turns SQLite tables.

items.subject: Plan Mode system prompt + patterns file
items.notes: system/config/patterns/brainstorm-plan-mode.md: protocol (call brainstorm_turn, generate 3-5 insights, offer 3 steering questions per turn), tone rules, anti-patterns. Activated by /metis_brainstorm skill.

items.subject: Steering buttons UI in Thinking tab
items.notes: Thinking tab brainstorm panel: topic input, 5 steering buttons (Expand/Focus/Challenge/Synthesize/Connect), 'Copy prompt for Claude Code' button that generates /metis_brainstorm prompt with selected steering. Recent sessions list via /api/partial/thinking/brainstorm-sessions.

items.subject: Cross-pollinate session context
items.notes: get_brainstorm_session(session_uuid) + list_brainstorm_sessions(limit) MCP tools provide session history for cross-session cross-pollination. Context payload returned by brainstorm_turn() already surfaces cross-domain library connections.

items.subject: Structured output format for saved brainstorms
items.notes: save_brainstorm_output(session_uuid, title, synthesis, action_items): writes outputs/brainstorms/<date>_<slug>.md with synthesis, action items, and turn log. Updates brainstorm_sessions.status to 'saved'.

items.subject: profile_dataset MCP tool
items.notes: tools/data_tools.py: profile_dataset(path, sample_rows). Shape, dtypes, null %, unique counts, numeric distributions (min/max/mean/median/p25/p75), top-5 values for categoricals. PII column scan before profiling. Supports CSV, TSV, Excel, SPSS (.sav), Stata (.dta).

items.subject: suggest_cleaning MCP tool
items.notes: suggest_cleaning(path): profiles the dataset and returns prioritised cleaning recommendations with rationale (high/medium/low). Checks duplicates, null %, whitespace, date columns.

items.subject: clean_dataset MCP tool
items.notes: clean_dataset(path, operations, output_path): applies drop_duplicates, drop_columns, fill_na, rename_column, strip_whitespace, standardize_dates, drop_na_rows, drop_na_rows_any. Never modifies original. Returns row/col delta.

items.subject: compare_profiles + list_supported_formats MCP tools
items.notes: compare_profiles(before_json, after_json): side-by-side diff with human_summary. list_supported_formats(): returns supported extensions + library versions.

items.subject: data-analyst agent (system-prompt + contract + registry)
items.notes: agents/data-analyst/system-prompt.md: 7-step workflow (intake → before report → propose → approve → clean → after report → audit). agents/data-analyst/contract.md. agent-registry.json entry (write-local tier). CLAUDE.md routing + invocation table updated. Packages installed: pandas 3.0.2, openpyxl 3.1.5, pyreadstat 1.3.4.

items.notes: office-hours, design-shotgun, qa patterns for Frontend Designer Builder and Software Engineer.

items.subject: Update implementation-progress.json — add Phase 5.4, 5.5, 5.6 milestones
items.notes: This update.

items.subject: Injection probe middleware for external tool results
items.notes: tools/guardrails.py: injection_probe(content) + probe_tool_result MCP tool. Detects 11 adversarial patterns + zero-width chars. Prepends INJECTION WARNING prefix (non-blocking — annotates, doesn't block). Primary surface: content-harvester, news-aggregator, librarian ingestion.

items.subject: max_turns enforcement with graceful truncation
items.notes: pipeline.py run_metis(): new max_turns=20 parameter. Counts session_events WHERE event_type='turn' for current session. Returns {status: truncated} message when exceeded, directing user to start a new session.

items.subject: Constitutional policy file + loader
items.notes: system/config/constitution.md: 12 rules across Clinical Safety, Statistical Integrity, Data Protection, Agent Behaviour, Routing, Research Integrity, PhD Protection. tools/guardrails.py: load_constitution(level) loads CRITICAL rules for quick/standard, all rules for deep/chain. Pipeline Stage 7.5 calls it automatically. get_constitution MCP tool exposes it.

items.subject: Multi-agent trust validation
items.notes: tools/guardrails.py: validate_agent_output(output, required_keys) + validate_pipeline_stage MCP tool. Treats sub-agent output with same suspicion as external tool output. Validates required keys before passing to next pipeline stage.

items.subject: YAML frontmatter on all 31 knowledge/library/ .md files
items.notes: YAML header added to 31 files: domain, tags (4-8 terms), related (2-7 links), phd_relevance (high/medium/low), status, updated. Defines graph edges via 'related' list.

items.subject: note_links SQLite table + DDL migration
items.notes: note_links table: source_path, target_path, link_type, source_title, target_title. Unique index on (source_path, target_path). Created on first kg_index_notes() run. 95 bidirectional pairs = 190 directed edges.

items.subject: MCP tools: kg_index_notes, kg_paths, kg_community
items.notes: tools/knowledge_graph.py: kg_index_notes() scans frontmatter → populates note_links; kg_paths(from, to, max_hops) BFS shortest paths; kg_community(note, depth) connected cluster. Server now has 74 tools.

items.subject: Graph view in Knowledge tab — D3 force-directed graph
items.notes: 4th nav pill 'Graph' in Knowledge tab. D3 v7 force-directed graph: nodes colored by domain, sized by phd_relevance, click-to-detail panel, filter input, zoom/pan, domain legend. Data API at /api/knowledge/graph-data.

items.subject: agent_spans table + observability DDL
items.notes: tools/observability.py: agent_spans table (span_id TEXT PK, parent_id, run_id, session_id, name, kind, status, start_ms, end_ms, duration_ms, error, tags, created_at). WAL-mode compatible.

items.subject: MCP tools: start_span, end_span, log_span, get_spans
items.notes: start_span() returns UUID span_id; end_span(span_id) calculates duration_ms from start_ms; log_span() one-shot for completed spans; get_spans() filtered by session/run. Server now has 78 tools.

items.subject: Span waterfall in Metis tab
items.notes: Traces card in metis_tab.html. /api/partial/metis/traces route in metis_tab.py. CSS horizontal waterfall bars sized by duration_ms, colored by kind (internal/tool/agent/llm). Run header shows status badge + timestamp. Legend rendered when >1 kind used.

items.subject: anonymize_text MCP tool — regex PII scrubbing
items.notes: tools/anonymization.py: anonymize_text(content, mode, replace_names). Reuses safety.py patterns: PATIENT_ID, GPS, Belgian NID, EMAIL, PHONE. Optional name heuristic (CAPITALIZED tokens). Returns JSON with anonymized text + replacements map + counters.

items.subject: diff_anonymization MCP tool — unified diff view
items.notes: diff_anonymization(original, anonymized): Python difflib unified_diff. Returns plain text diff suitable for display in dashboard or agent output.

items.subject: Trust badge enhanced with network policy indicator
items.notes: main.py trust_badge(): reads system/config/network-policy.json. Icons: bi-shield-lock (strict/warning), bi-wifi-off (offline/danger), bi-shield-check (normal). Badge updates every 60s.

items.subject: Consent ledger MCP tools + dashboard card
items.notes: log_consent_event() + get_consent_ledger() MCP tools. consent_ledger table (id, timestamp, action, data_classification, agent_slug, notes, session_id). Metis tab card shows recent events with colour-coded classification badges.

items.subject: Network policy MCP tools + dashboard badge
items.notes: set_network_policy(policy) + get_network_policy() MCP tools. Persists to system/config/network-policy.json. Policies: strict/normal/offline. Dashboard consent card header shows live badge via /api/partial/metis/network-policy.
